category: Gaming Elements Displaying Inherent Numerical Value
explanation: Dice, Playing Cards, Dominoes, and a Roulette Wheel all inherently display or are primarily known for having numerical values as a core part of their function in games. A Chess Knight, while a game piece, does not inherently display a numerical value; its value is strategic, not numerical on its face.

category: Signers of the Declaration of Independence
explanation: John Hancock, Benjamin Franklin, Thomas Jefferson, and John Adams all signed the Declaration of Independence. George Washington, while a prominent Founding Father, was commanding the Continental Army and did not sign the Declaration.
Sweet, Salty, Bitter, and Sour are all recognized primary tastes detected by the tongue. Soft describes a tactile sensation or texture, not a taste.
